hero.title: DPX Digital: The Future of Professional Experience
hero.subtitle: A unified platform to manage, track, and amplify your company's professional development programs with the power of AI.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: Our platform is packed with powerful features to streamline your programs, enhance learning, and measure impact.

streamlinedWorkflows.title: Streamlined Workflows
streamlinedWorkflows.description: Digital enrollment and automated approval processes for participants, admins, and HR.

interactiveDigitalDiary.title: Interactive Digital Diary
interactiveDigitalDiary.description: Log activities, reflections, and upload multimedia content (text, photos, videos).

aiAssistedReporting.title: AI-Assisted Reporting
aiAssistedReporting.description: Automatically generate A3 reports by summarizing diary entries and feedback.

structuredFeedback.title: Structured Feedback
structuredFeedback.description: Collect guided feedback from receiving units with scores and attachments.

executiveDashboards.title: Executive Dashboards
executiveDashboards.description: Monitor KPIs, ROI, and participant progress in real-time with powerful analytics.

lgpdCompliant.title: LGPD Compliant
lgpdCompliant.description: Ensure data privacy and compliance with digital signatures and consent control.
